title: Soul Soil is Dirt
description: Makes Soul Soil have dirt-like functionalities.
body:
Makes Soul Soil have dirt-like functionalities.

For instance, bamboo can be planted on it, Pumpkins and Melon can grow on it, that kind of stuff... Nothing crazy really.


![Sapling on Soul Soil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4c38f023ac084bf257a6068600792654f131731.png)
